name: rapitas
description: 階層型タスク管理システム

scripts.dev:frontend: cd rapitas-frontend && cross-env pnpm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd rapitas-backend && bun install && cd ../rapitas-frontend && npm install
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd rapitas-backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:push: cd rapitas-backend && npx prisma db push
